title: Blood collection and serum preparation in mice
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"7ajkl","text":"This protocol describes blood collection from mice and serum preparation. The resulting serum can be used for ELISA or multiplex cytokine assays.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
materials_text: {"blocks":[{"key":"fnu2q","text":"Drugs and solutions:","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":20}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"9dlpo","text":"- Sodium pentobarbital (7mg/mL in saline)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"73ac2","text":"- PBS 1X (pH~7.5)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"fq89d","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"ai6sh","text":"Apparatus:","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":10}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"b7lcg","text":"- Refrigered microcentrifuge","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"ffqss","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"656ch","text":"Other materials:","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":16}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"dl7dn","text":"- scissors for dissection","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"56kqi","text":"- 1.6mL eppendorf tubes","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"4nmie","text":"- 1mL syringe with 21G needle","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Mice are anesthetized with an intraperitoneal injection of sodium pentobarbital ( 100 mg/kg ).
Blood is harvested via cardiac puncture with a 1 mL syringe and 21G needle. This is a terminal procedure and is typically performed immediately before euthanasia or tissue harvest.
Blood is collected in a dry 1.6 mL eppendorf tube.
Allow blood to clot 00:20:00 at Room temperature .
The sample is centrifuged at 2000 x g, 4 °C, 15 minutes to obtain serum.

Serum is kept at -80 °C until analysis. For a multiplex cytokine analysis, a 2-fold dilution of serum is prepared with PBS pH 7.5 prior to freezing. Label samples with unique animal and group identifiers and keep under conditions compatible with the assay provider’s instructions.
creator: Amandine Even
